title: Tower T80302 Cerasure 3 Piece Saucepan Set with Non-Stick Coating, Suitable for All Hob Types Including Induction, 16/18/20cm, Graphite
features: CERASURE COATING: the strong ceramic coating features non-stick qualities so food doesn’t stick to the pan and makes for easy cleaning
OIL-FREE COOKING: remove the need for large quantities of oil to produce healthier cooking results for you or all the family
ALUMINIUM BODY: features a lightweight and highly durable design to handle everyday use
ERGONOMICALLY DESIGNED: soft cool touch handles provide complete comfort and control for efficient performance
5 YEAR WARRANTY: get 5 years peace of mind in the event of a fault with the product
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value. Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T80303 Cerasure 3 Piece Saucepan Set with Non-Stick Coating, Suitable for all Hob Types, Graphite Same flavoursome meals with less oil – use the Cerasure cookware collection suitable for any avid cook This Cerasure 3 Piece Saucepan Set by Tower is ideal for any avid cook. Constructed from high quality aluminium, this versatile set consists of 16cm, 18cm and 20cm saucepans with tempered glass lids to help lock in flavour. The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating prevents food sticking, requiring little oil for a healthier alternative. Cerasure ceramic coating is PFAS, PFAO, PTFE, lead and cadmium free whilst the bonded steel base heats evenly, ensuring thoroughly cooked food. 3 Piece Saucepan Set: 16cm, 18cm and 20cm Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating Dishwasher suitable – hand wash recommended Suitable for all hob types, including induction PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead and Cadmium free Graphite exterior with heat resistant coating Do not use in the oven or grill 3pc PAN SET WITH TEMPERED GLASS LIDS Consisting of 16cm, 18cm and 20cm saucepans, cooks of all standards will easily achieve flavoursome meals with this high quality, aluminium 3 piece saucepan set. All saucepans come with tempered glass lids with steam vents for optimum control when cooking 3X STRONGER NON-STICK COATING The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating is 3x stronger than others. Little oil is required for healthier eating, while the coating ensures food does not stick to the pan SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES Heating evenly with no hot spots, the robust bonded steel base provides even heat distribution, ensuring food is cooked thoroughly and evenly. For cooking versatility, the set is compatible with all hob types, including induction
